rumpe

Breaks out of the innermost loop.

Aliases: break

Syntax: rumpe

Category

transfer

Related

  • [perge](/corpus/perge.html)
  • [dum](/corpus/dum.html)

Examples

examples/corpus/rumpe/rumpe.fab (canonical ¬∑ keyword)

Breaks out of the innermost loop.

# Break (rumpe) in loops
#
# rumpe   -- exit innermost dum/itera immediately
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   breakStmt :‚Üê 'rumpe'
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   0‚Äì4 (stops before 5), then nested pairs until interior hits 2.

incipit {
    # Break when reaching 5
    varia _ i ‚Üê 0

    dum i < 10 {
        si i ‚â° 5 {
            rumpe
        }
        nota i
        i ‚Üê i + 1
    }

    # Break in nested loop
    varia _ exterior ‚Üê 0

    dum exterior < 3 {
        varia _ interior ‚Üê 0

        dum interior < 10 {
            si interior ‚â° 2 {
                rumpe
            }
            nota "exterior‚Üê¬ß, interior‚Üê¬ß"(exterior, interior)
            interior ‚Üê interior + 1
        }

        exterior ‚Üê exterior + 1
    }
}

Expected output:

0
1
2
3
4
exterior‚Üê0, interior‚Üê0
exterior‚Üê0, interior‚Üê1
exterior‚Üê1, interior‚Üê0
exterior‚Üê1, interior‚Üê1
exterior‚Üê2, interior‚Üê0
exterior‚Üê2, interior‚Üê1
Sources
